languages.text: "Как скажете, Ваша Светлость, только нам бы долго не задерживаться".
"As you say, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, but we shouldn't stand around here for too long."
languages.original_text: "Как скажете, Ваша Светлость, только нам бы долго не задерживаться".

traits.locale_text: "As you say, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, but we shouldn't stand around here for too long."
"As you say, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, but we shouldn't stand around here for too long."
"You're a strange one. What's there to think about, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}? I'm following orders, and she's disobeying them. Seems straightforward from where I'm standing."
"As you say, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, but we shouldn't stand around here for too long."
"As you say, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, but we shouldn't stand around here for too long."

languages.text: 「あなたは変わった人ですね。何を考えればいいのですか、御{mf|殿|女}様。私は命令に従っているのに、彼女は命令に逆らうだけ。私の立場から見れば、単純な話ですよ」
languages.original_text: "You're a strange one. What's there to think about, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}? I'm following orders, and she's disobeying them. Seems straightforward from where I'm standing."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたは変わった人ですね。何を考えればいいのですか、御{mf|殿|女}様。私は命令に従っているのに、彼女は命令に逆らうだけ。私の立場から見れば、単純な話ですよ。」

languages.text: "Nasıl dilerseniz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri ama burada uzun süre dikilmemeliyiz."
languages.original_text: "As you say, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, but we shouldn't stand around here for too long."

traits.locale_text: "Nasıl dilerseniz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri ama burada uzun süre dikilmemeliyiz."

languages.text: «Como diga, mi{mf|lord|lady}, pero no deberíamos permanecer mucho tiempo aquí».
languages.original_text: "As you say, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, but we shouldn't stand around here for too long."

traits.locale_text: «Como diga, mi{mf|lord|lady}, pero no deberíamos permanecer mucho tiempo aquí».

languages.text: “您说得是，舰长大人，不过我们最好别在这儿耽搁太久。”
languages.original_text: "As you say, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, but we shouldn't stand around here for too long."

traits.locale_text: “您说得是，舰长大人，不过我们最好别在这儿耽搁太久。”

languages.text: « Très bien, Votre Seigneurie, mais nous ne devrions pas traîner ici. »
languages.original_text: "As you say, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, but we shouldn't stand around here for too long."

traits.locale_text: « Très bien, Votre Seigneurie, mais nous ne devrions pas traîner ici. »

languages.text: "Wie Ihr wünscht, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, aber wir sollten hier nicht zu lange herumstehen."
languages.original_text: "As you say, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, but we shouldn't stand around here for too long."

traits.locale_text: "Wie Ihr wünscht, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, aber wir sollten hier nicht zu lange herumstehen."
